title: LIRS Stakeholders Meeting  on Deduction of Withholding Tax on Commission
description: Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS) Meeting with stakeholders in Fast Moving Consumers Goods (FMCG), Gaming and Multi-level Marketing Sector on Deduction of Withholding Tax on Commission.
html: Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS) Meeting with stakeholders in Fast Moving Consumers Goods (FMCG), Gaming and Multi-level Marketing Sector on Deduction of Withholding Tax on Commission.
